source_pin: superbot affd7ea1ae5163109527e59ce73b46f0a8c7866c — disbot/utils/farm/farm.py + disbot/services/farm_workflow.py + disbot/services/economy_helpers.py (harvested firsthand at drafting; this run is hermetic — fixtures only)

header_claims.L1: Buying hens scales the faucet but each costs more coins (the sink), so the loop stays self-balancing
header_claims.L2: an idle player banks at most ~40 coins over ~100 min before the coop caps — a small fraction of a `!daily`

rounding_note: Python-3 banker's round on float powers, per the committed formulas round(40*1.55**max(0,current-1)) and round(100*1.8**max(0,level)); tables re-derived under the pinned CPython minor and asserted equal before any cell runs (F1)

write_semantics.collect: settle, pay eggs*EGG_VALUE, persist (0, now) — sub-interval remainder DISCARDED; empty coop (settled eggs <= 0) writes NOTHING (state, incl. updated_at, unchanged)
write_semantics.buy: settle at the OLD flock size first, persist (settled.eggs, now) then apply the increment — no retroactive laying; any write stamps now
write_semantics.no_cooldown: no cooldown exists on the collect path; purchases/collects happen only at check-ins

drafter_disclosed.note: comparison only, NEVER gated — the sim re-derives from scratch and must not trust these

pinned_interpretations.purchase_gate: a purchase (or purchase plan) qualifies iff its marginal steady-state rate at the cell's NOMINAL cadence is strictly positive AND its payback (price / marginal-R, in days, exact Fraction) <= P_max = 14 days; zero-marginal options are never bought; the payback rule gates EVERY buyer (the WHALE leg removes only affordability)
pinned_interpretations.greedy_pick: at each check-in, after settle+collect, repeatedly buy the minimum-payback AFFORDABLE qualifying plan until none is affordable or none qualifies; tie-break key (payback, plan-length, total-price, kind order hen<coop)
pinned_interpretations.pair_policy: PAIR's plan set is GREEDY's singles UNION the two-purchase combos {hen+hen, hen+coop, coop+coop} priced at the execution-order state (order-independent totals), qualified on JOINT payback <= 14 days; min-payback affordable plan wins with singles preferred on ties (plan-length in the tie-break key)
pinned_interpretations.alt_policy: strict alternation coop-first; if the required next kind fails a non-affordability gate (ceiling, zero marginal, payback) the policy halts permanently (the state is frozen so the disqualification is permanent); mere unaffordability waits
pinned_interpretations.policy_marginals_nominal: policy marginals/paybacks are always evaluated at the cell's nominal cadence Delta, in Arm S too — jitter perturbs timing and income, never the policy's R basis
pinned_interpretations.wall_day: wall(Delta, policy) = day (exact Fraction t/86400) of the first check-in at which the policy's qualifying plan set — affordability IGNORED — is empty; state freezes with the plan set, so the wall is permanent once hit; walls are read off the closed-wallet Arm-A decision trajectory
pinned_interpretations.armA_plateau: plateau = exact closed-form R(n_final, L_final, Delta) as a Fraction, per registration
pinned_interpretations.armA_checkins: check-ins at t = k*Delta for k = 1..floor(H_end/Delta), H_end = 90*86400; a check-in at exactly t = H_end is processed
pinned_interpretations.armS_window: plateau = coins collected with t in (75*86400, 90*86400] divided by 15 days (exact Fraction per trajectory); cell mean exact, SE = sqrt(unbiased sample variance / N) as float
pinned_interpretations.armS_gap_map: gap = lo + int(r*span) with r = rng.random(), span = hi-lo+1 — uniform over the integer range up to double-precision quantization (relative bias < 1e-12, disclosed); skip iff rng.random() < 1/10; exactly two draws per attempted check-in, gap then skip, including the final overshooting attempt (t > H_end) that terminates the trajectory
pinned_interpretations.armS_skip: a skipped check-in performs no settle/collect/purchase — accrual continues from the last written updated_at
pinned_interpretations.collect_zero_edge: a settled-to-zero collect writes nothing (updated_at preserved); a purchase always stamps updated_at = now (remainder discarded), matching farm_workflow
pinned_interpretations.degenerate_identity: the Arm-S machinery run at gap == Delta, skip off, ZERO rng draws, must reproduce Arm A's event log (t, eggs, coins, purchases, wallet) exactly, per decision cell
pinned_interpretations.armS_confirmation_policy: the Arm-S confirmation for a firing cadence is evaluated on that cadence's Arm-A best-of-family policy cell: mean > threshold AND float(mean - threshold) >= 4*SE
pinned_interpretations.approve_legs_policy: the APPROVE early-loop leg (first 3 purchases each payback <= 7 days) and the wall-day leg (>= 10 days at >= 3 of 4 cadences) are evaluated on GREEDY, the family's base loop
pinned_interpretations.best_of_family: argmax of Arm-A plateau over the policy family in registered order (first wins ties)
pinned_interpretations.zero_marginal_hen_share: at the final state: (n - min(n, ceil(cap/epc))) / n with epc = Delta // LAY_INTERVAL — the share of the flock whose removal would not change R
pinned_interpretations.N_reporting_choice: N = 500 for the stability-leg grid (registered) and for the reporting jitter legs (fixture choice, disclosed — the registration pins the worlds, not the reporting N; V060 control-N precedent)
pinned_interpretations.reporting_rng_order: one RNG seeded 20261343 serves the reporting jitter legs in pinned order: Delta=300 column (best policy), Delta=604800 column (best policy), then jitter-width legs (Delta ascending x width 1/4 then 3/4, best policy per cadence); all other reporting legs are seedless Arm-A re-runs
pinned_interpretations.aux_gate: random.Random(20261344) is constructed and asserted to have consumed zero draws via getstate() equality with a fresh Random(20261344)
